methodsAttempted.query: Baku Engineering University artificial intelligence policy site:beu.edu.az OR site:beu.edu.az/en
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official BEU strategic development plan PDF and AI-related official news pages.
Azerbaijani-language query surfaced AI program, seminar, visit, and infosession pages, mostly event/program context rather than policy guidance.

methodsAttempted.query: site:beu.edu.az Baku Engineering University ChatGPT AI academic integrity policy
methodsAttempted.notes: No official BEU ChatGPT or AI academic-integrity policy result was found.

artifacts.summary: Discovery found one official BEU strategic-plan PDF suitable for a narrow institutional teaching/digital-transformation claim. Other official AI pages were event or infrastructure news and were rejected for policy evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: Strategic Development Plan of Baku Engineering University for 2024-2029

stopConditions: Stop after extracting citation-ready evidence from the official strategic development plan.
Do not infer binding academic-integrity or tool-use rules without a dedicated BEU policy or guidance source.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Strategic Development Plan of Baku Engineering University for 2024-2029

artifacts.claimText: Baku Engineering University's 2024-2029 strategic development plan includes integrating artificial intelligence technologies into teaching as part of its digital transformation timeline, with a measurable objective to digitize 50 courses by 2025.

artifacts.title: Baku Engineering University AI Teaching Strategy Candidate
artifacts.summary: Baku Engineering University's official 2024-2029 strategic development plan supports one narrow agent-reviewed candidate claim: BEU plans to integrate artificial intelligence technologies into teaching under digital transformation and measure progress by digitizing 50 courses by 2025. No dedicated official BEU AI academic-integrity, approved-tools, privacy, or procurement policy was found in this run.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The approved candidate is based on an institutional strategic plan, not a dedicated AI-use policy or binding classroom rule.
